topic: New York City air quality discussion and Canadian wildfire smoke verification
objective: Verify or falsify the causal chain from Canadian wildfire source activity, through smoke transport, to New York City metro air-quality impact and public interpretation during 2023-06-06 to 2023-06-08.

region.label: New York City metro area, USA

hypotheses: Canadian wildfire activity north of New York generated smoke that was transported into the New York City metro area and drove the local PM2.5 and AQI spike.
Public air-quality concern in New York during the mission window tracks the wildfire-smoke impact rather than a purely local emissions explanation.

approved_layers.reason: This run may use one anchored GDELT bulk layer after article recon if public attribution remains diffuse.
